rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Finds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 23, 2014 line 1. PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'s Motion On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Funds GRANTED. Trustee shall deposit $164,210.92 with the Court and be discharged of any further responsibility for the disbursement of the sale proceeds upon such deposit. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Final Award Of Arbitrator And To Confirm Partial Final Award Or To Correct Final Award

PETITIONERs JOHN BANNER, DOUG WELSH'sd Motion To Vacate Final Award Of Arbitrator And To Confirm Partial Final Award Or To Correct Final Award Hearing Required to address Court's authority to confirm partial arbitration award. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELLEN TSANG VS. CHARLES ENGELBERG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 23, 2014 line 3.DEFENDANT CHARLES ENGELBERG MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Discretionary relief under CCP 473(b) is denied. Engelberg fails to sustain burden and show mistake, surprise or excusable neglect. Hearing Requried regarding mandatory relief under CCP 473(b). Moving party is ordered to file and serve supplemental declarations by Engelberg and Jennifer Kung Gelini specifically indicating the exact date Engelberg first told Jennifer Gelini about being served with CGC-14-537471 summons and complaint. Supplemental declarations shall be filed and served by 9:00 a.m. on June 23, 2014. Courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than 9:15 a.m. on June 23, 2014. = (501/REQ)
